name: Alaska Air Group, Inc.
description: Alaska Air Group, Inc. is an airline holding company headquartered in SeaTac, Washington. It is the parent company of Alaska Airlines, a major American airline, and Horizon Air, a regional carrier. Together with its partner airlines, Alaska Air Group serves more than 120 destinations across the United States, Belize, Canada, Costa Rica, and Mexico. The company operates a modern fleet of Boeing 737 and Embraer 175 aircraft, offering passenger and cargo services, and is a member of the oneworld global airline alliance.
